# Copilot Instructions

## Runtime & Tooling
- Command line shell: PowerShell (pwsh)
- Do NOT generate bash or zsh commands
- Prefer cross-platform PowerShell syntax

## Frontend Framework
- Vue.js version: 3.5+
- Use Composition API only
- Use `<script setup>` syntax
- Do NOT generate Vue 2 Options API

## Language
- TypeScript only
- Strict typing
- No `any`
- Explicit return types for public APIs
- Use `type` not `interface`

## UI
- Element Plus
- Vue 3 compatible APIs only

## CSS
- UnoCSS(presetWind4)

## Style
- FRP or FP
- Less side effects during setup
- 始终返回中文内容
